metaDescription: Learn about the cookies used by ScreenXRecorder, including Google Analytics and Google AdSense cookies and how to manage them.
metaOgDescription: Cookies Policy - ScreenXRecorder: information about the cookies we use and how to control them.
intro: This Cookies Policy explains what cookies are, which cookies ScreenXRecorder uses, and how you can control them. By continuing to use this website, you consent to our use of cookies as described below.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work correctly, provide a better user experience, and supply information to website owners. Cookies do not give access to your device and cannot run programs.

sections.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
sections.content:
ScreenXRecorder uses the following types of cookies:

  • Analytical / Performance Cookies: These cookies collect anonymous information about how visitors use the website (pages visited, session duration, browser type). We use Google Analytics for this purpose.
  • Advertising Cookies: Used by Google AdSense to display relevant advertisements based on your interests and browsing history.
  • Functional / Local Storage: We use the browser's localStorage to save your preferences such as theme (light/dark) and language selection. This data is stored entirely on your device and is never transmitted.

sections.title: 3. Google Analytics Cookies
sections.content:
We use Google Analytics (tracking ID: UA-57403439-5) to collect anonymized statistics about website traffic. Google Analytics sets the following cookies:

  • _ga: Distinguishes unique users. Expires after 2 years.
  • _gid: Distinguishes unique users. Expires after 24 hours.
  • _gat: Throttles request rate. Expires after 1 minute.

All data is anonymized. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

sections.title: 4. Google AdSense Cookies
sections.content: We use Google AdSense to serve advertising. Google AdSense may use cookies and web beacons to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites. You can opt out of personalized advertising at any time by visiting Google Ads Settings or by visiting www.aboutads.info.

sections.title: 5. How to Control and Delete Cookies
sections.content:
You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:

  • View which cookies have been set on your device.
  • Delete all or specific cookies.
  • Block cookies from specific or all websites.
  • Set preferences for certain websites.

Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the functionality of some parts of this website. For step-by-step guidance on managing cookies in your browser, visit www.aboutcookies.org.

sections.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use of this website after any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at: {{CONTACT_EMAIL}}
